# Testing

This is a navigation alias. Canonical verification sources stay in the files below.

## Canonical Sources

- Test matrix and commands: `TEST_PLAN.md`
- Gate status and evidence: `QUALITY_GATES.md`
- Verification contract: `.pfo/VERIFICATION_CONTRACT.json`
- Golden flows: `.pfo/GOLDEN_FLOWS.md`
- CI workflow: `.github/workflows/validate.yml`

## Rule

Update `TEST_PLAN.md`, `QUALITY_GATES.md`, and verification evidence first. Keep this file as a short index only.
